articles.title: Bitcoin Wins In Europe As EU Parliament Committee Rejects Proposal Limiting Proof-Of-Work
articles.description: The EU parliament yesterday rejected the proposal limiting proof-of-work in a closely won vote. The clause raised a lot of eyebrows from people in the industry because of the threat it poses to Bitcoin and other major cryptocurrencies. Despite this temporary victory, it is still a long road ahead for cryptocurrencies in Europe.
